EmailTemplate.name: Digital Booking Link - Customer
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Digital Booking form and Quotation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Opportunity.Name},
Thank you for showing interest in our project {!Project__c.Name} and Unit {!Project_Unit__c.RW_Param4__c}. Please find below the "Digital Booking" link for your kind perusal. You may call on {!SMPhoneNumber} for any assistance.
{!DigitalBooking} to fill the Booking Form.
Regards, Runwal Group
